creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
A new port for VJE-Delta 3.0 trial version, which makes
installation process much easier thanks to the ports mechanism.

How-To-Repeat: 
e.g.)
	make install

	make deinstall

No build, no package. Tested on 3.4-STABLE and on 4.0-CURRENT.

The GUI accessory called "moji-nyuuryoku" dialog box is available only
if both JDK and JFC ports are installed.
